description: Senior Backend Developer at Obsly, a real-time observability platform processing hundreds of millions of events per day.
Building new platform features and designing analytics dashboards for metrics exploration at scale.
Event-driven and pub/sub architectures, time-series databases, LLM-powered query generation from natural language.
Tech lead for WinDelivery by Glovo, a food delivery integration platform connecting restaurant brands with POS systems, delivery aggregators and last-mile logistics.
Designed a scalable integration ecosystem used by RB Iberia (Burger King, Popeyes), ALSEA (Foster's Hollywood, VIPS), FDB (Telepizza) and Dunkin' Donuts.
Event-driven architecture on AWS (Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, RDS, Cognito). CI/CD and CloudWatch monitoring.
Backend team responsible for the redesign of Savia, MAPFRE's health insurance and e-health platform.
Re-architecture towards a modular, reusable platform (Multimap) to support multiple business verticals.
Python, Django REST Framework, Oscar Commerce, Stripe, Celery, Docker, Jenkins.
Device management platforms for STBs and OTT players used by millions of Telefónica customers.
High-performance REST APIs with Python/Sanic, observability with Prometheus and Grafana.
Modernisation of legacy multicast-based STB management tools.
Maritime surveillance and border control platform for law enforcement and national security agencies.
Real-time integration of AIS, SIVE radar networks and FIWARE/Orion Context Broker.
Event-driven communication via Redis Streams for high-resilience in low-connectivity environments.
Technical team leader for the Porsche digitalisation project across 570 dealerships worldwide.
Technological migrations, HelpDesk setup and software development for monitoring.
DjangoRF, Vue.js, MariaDB, Augmented Reality (AR), Docker.
Development of new multimedia products as Designer, Developer & Product Manager.
Open Innovation environment: startup mentoring, partner integrations and project management.
Technological consultant for the Inditex group. Conceptualisation of retail and automotive spaces.
Design, development and deployment of commercial streaming products.
Adaptive Multiscreen Transcoder, DVB MPTS Streaming Tools and IPTV headend solutions.
Transcoder software developer. Documentation, training, design and implementation of degree project.
Deployment of the OTT Kaltura platform on AWS servers and integration with Wowza for Canal7RíasBaixas.
